title: SimpleHelp security advisory (AV26-642)
description: On May 26, 2026, SimpleHelp published a security update to address vulnerabilities in the following product:
products: SimpleHelp   versions 5.5.0 to versions prior to 5.5.16
SimpleHelp   versions 6.0 to versions prior to 6.0 RC2
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
